title: PPIP -  Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Share Data
scenario: Verify that after onboarding, the PPIP dialog appears, accepting it enables the Share Data toggle in Account settings with correct privacy description, and the Home screen is displayed.
steps: Start the app for the first time, go through onboarding, and tap "Continue as Guest".
Verify the PPIP dialog "Help us improve your experience" appears.
Tap "Share Data" and handle location permission (iOS only).
Verify the dialog closes and the Home screen displays.
Go to App Settings > General > Account.
Verify the Share Data toggle is ON.
Verify the description explains that basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, no personal data is collected, and it is not shared with third parties.
expected: The PPIP dialog appears after onboarding. After tapping "Share Data", the dialog closes and the Home screen displays. In App Settings > General > Account, the Share Data toggle is ON with a description stating that basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, no personal data is collected, and it is not shared with third parties.
